name: naics
title: NAICS — Industry Classification (2022)
description: The 2022 North American Industry Classification System — the standard taxonomy for classifying business establishments by industry, from broad sectors down to specific national industries.

code.description: NAICS 2022 code — 2 digits (or a hyphenated sector range) down to a 6-digit national industry; the hierarchy is read from the code length.

title.description: Official Census title for the code, with the trilateral-comparable superscript 'T' marker stripped.

level.description: Hierarchy level derived from the code shape: sector, subsector, industry_group, naics_industry or national_industry.

description.description: Official Census description of the industry; NULL for codes that defer to a child code.

corpus.description: Lowercased, accent-stripped concatenation of title + description — a derived free-text search field, not a source attribute.
